description.from: Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack by 252*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Attack Speed by 10%, and Physical Defense by 91*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 8sec.
description.to: For 8 sec, increases the ATK of all allies by 302*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Attack Speed by 10%, and Physical DEF by 91*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)).

description.from: Every second, Attack increases by 16*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Status Resistance by 10, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 1%. This effect stacks up to 20 times.
description.to: Every 1 sec, increases ATK by 10*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Status Resistance by 10, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 1%. This effect stacks up to 30 times.

IV.from: Status Resistance increases by 30 for each stack.
IV.to: Status Resistance increases by 10 for each stack.

description.from: [Smash] reduces the target’s ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Smash] reduces the target's ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets' Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
description.to: [Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.

description.from: [Vortex] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by {1}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Vortex] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by {1}% for 10 Sec.
